Tourists book Phú Quốc's south coast. Savvy ones book Ong Lang.

Mövenpick Villas & Residences Phú Quốc sits in a quieter zone most first-timers scroll past. 4.6 stars across 2,444 reviews. The villas give you space. The beach in front gives you breathing room.

If you want the resort energy, stay south. If you want actual rest, you already know.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
